ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file containing the dataset */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dataset */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the dataset */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of data (e.g., National, State) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "reporting_period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reporting period */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL link to the source of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_reporting_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporting_period_id") REFERENCES reporting_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Education, Drugs and Alcohol) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Securely hashed user password */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset to which the attachment belongs */,
  "attachment_file" TEXT /* Name of the attachment file */,
  "attachment_url" TEXT /* URL link to the attachment */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the attachment file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment file (e.g., CSV, PDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* Information about the user's browser or device */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset related to the change */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made to the dataset */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting period */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the reporting period */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the reporting period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the reporting period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)
